flashcards.front: What is the basic syntax for assigning a value to a structure member in C?
Which operator is used to access a member of a structure variable?
How do you assign the value 25 to the 'age' member of a structure variable 'person1'?
What is the role of the assignment operator (=) in assigning values to structure members?
flashcards.back: It assigns the specified value to the member of the structure variable.

flashcards.front: Can you assign values to all members of a structure at once? If yes, how?
flashcards.back: Yes, you can assign values during the declaration of the structure variable using an initializer list, e.g., struct Person p1 = {25, "John"};
